title: Change Data Type
description:
Write a solution to correct the errors:
The grade column is stored as floats, convert it to integers.
The result format is in the following example.

examples.example_text:
DataFrame students
+-------------+--------+
| Column Name | Type   |
+-------------+--------+
| student_id  | int    |
| name        | object |
| age         | int    |
| grade       | float  |
+-------------+--------+

hints: Consider using a build-in function in pandas library with a dictionary to convert the datatype of columns as specified.
